description: Introduction to SolanaFM, focusing on its new interface and features aimed at enhancing user experience and performance. Key updates include a cleaner design, improved transaction flow, and the addition of a Validators page.
topic_summary: Overview of SolanaFM's enhancements, including interface updates [t=29:49], transaction flow improvements [t=200:68], and the introduction of a Validators page [t=135:13].
